docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR NO HEARINGS HELD. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO FUTHER SERVICE IS NEEDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. (D506) TO DEC-21-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
